case_title: COLIN REILLY VS. MICHAEL K SPILLANE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-15-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REILLY, COLIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SPILLANE, MICHAEL K DBA MIKE PLUMBING & ENGINEERING CONTRACTOR $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,125.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
